argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const strip = (html) => (html || '').replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '').replace(/ /g, ' ').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>').replace(/&/g, '&').replace(/<em>/g, '').replace(/<\/em>/g, '').trim(); const keyword = '{{ query }}'; const limit = {{ limit }}; const res = await fetch('https://www.zhihu.com/api/v4/search_v3?q=' + encodeURIComponent(keyword) + '&t=general&offset=0&limit=' + limit, { credentials: 'include' }); const d = await res.json(); return (d?.data || []).filter(item => item.type === 'search_result').map((item, i) => { const obj = item.object || {}; const q = obj.question || {}; return { rank: i + 1, type: obj.type, title: strip(obj.title || q.name || ''), author: obj.author?.name || '', votes: obj.voteup_count || 0, url: obj.type === 'answer' ? 'https://www.zhihu.com/question/' + q.id + '/answer/' + obj.id : obj.type === 'article' ? 'https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/' + obj.id : 'https://www.zhihu.com/question/' + obj.id }; }); }
